overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a sunlit Mediterranean-style rural village with stone architecture. The character walks along dirt paths, passes through a covered walkway, and wades through a shallow stream while surveying the rustic buildings and mountain backdrop.

agents.ego_description: standing by the stream then walking along the bank, looking around at the stone farmhouse and mountain scenery

entered.detail: two-story stone building with red tiled roof and arched doorways
small stone arch bridge crossing the stream
snow-capped mountains visible in the background
tall thin evergreen trees near the buildings
purple flowering bushes along the stream bank

segments.scene_description: The character stands by a shallow stream in a sunlit mountain village, with a stone farmhouse and bridge visible ahead. Tall cypress trees and purple lavender line the banks as the character begins walking along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated dirt path with vegetable garden

events.description: turns from stream bank onto elevated dirt path alongside stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path past wooden crates and a vegetable garden with ripe tomato plants

entered.detail: stacked wooden crates and barrels beside the path
vegetable garden with tomato plants bearing red fruit
low stone wall bordering the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated dirt path bordered by a stone wall, passing wooden crates and a vegetable garden with tomato plants. The main stone farmhouse remains visible to the left while the stream falls out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along stream with hanging meats

events.description: enters covered stone walkway with wooden roof structure alongside the stream

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway alongside the stream, passing hanging cured meats and wooden support beams

entered.detail: roofed stone walkway with wooden support beams overhead
cured meat joints hanging from the roof beams
arched stone entrance to another building section

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone walkway with a wooden roof, where cured meats hang from the beams. The stream runs alongside to the right, and the lighting becomes diffused under the shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream bed with rocky bottom

events.description: steps down from stone ledge into the shallow stream, transitioning from walking to wading through water

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream, looking around at the village buildings and rocky banks while water ripples around the character's legs

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible stones and pebbles on the bottom
simple wooden bridge spanning the stream
eroded earth and stone cliff face along the stream edge

segments.scene_description: The character steps down into the shallow stream and wades through the clear water, with the rocky stream bed visible beneath. The stone farmhouse appears on the right bank while a wooden footbridge spans the stream ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit mountain village, transitioning from an open riverside path into a sheltered walkway before ending in the water. It begins beside a shallow stream lined with cypress trees and purple lavender, moving along a dirt path toward a stone farmhouse and bridge. As the camera advances, the path elevates behind a stone wall, passing by wooden crates and a vegetable garden while the stream recedes from view. The scene then shifts into a covered stone walkway with a wooden roof and hanging cured meats, where the lighting becomes diffused and the stream reappears to the right. Finally, the camera steps down from the shelter to wade through the clear, rocky bed of the stream, heading toward a wooden footbridge with the farmhouse now positioned on the right bank.
